title: Billing & Subscription Plans
content:
CloudDesk offers three plans:

**Starter (Free):** Up to 3 users, 5 integrations, 1GB storage.
**Pro ($29/user/month):** Unlimited users, all integrations, 50GB storage, priority support.
**Enterprise (Custom):** SSO, custom contracts, SLA guarantees, dedicated support.

Billing cycles: Monthly or Annual (20% discount on annual).

To upgrade: Settings → Billing → Change Plan → Select tier → Enter payment details → Confirm.

Invoices are emailed on the 1st of each billing month and available under Settings → Billing → Invoice History.

Refund policy: Refunds are available within 14 days of a charge for annual plans if you have not used more than 10% of resources.
